title: Cobblemon Alphas
body:
# I've become a developer on the [Alpha Project](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-alpha-project) mod! The features of this pack have been moved there.

![Cobblemon Alphas Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71d33a1ed8548d7e1a78d4633ffbcf84ffade7ac.png)

## Cobblemon Alphas adds Alpha Pokemon to Cobblemon!

- Every fully evolved pokemon has a 1/4 chance of becoming an Alpha
- Alpha Pokemon will be aggressive towards players
- Alpha Pokemon have 3 perfect IVs and are 1.25x the size

![An Alpha Charizard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a36f357b19b78f975cfa3d8d4def6530c804d6e6_0.webp)

## Datapack Installation Instructions
Add the `.zip` to **BOTH YOUR WORLD AND AS A RESOURCE PACK**
